principles: Every PDF must be final-client-ready, not a draft.
Keep secrets out of prompts, markdown, logs and requests.
Use structured request data first; let Hermes write copy from the template contract before compiling.

common_request_fields.cliente.cnpj_cpf: Optional. Use only when provided by the user or a safe CRM source.
common_request_fields.execucao.resumo: Short natural-language summary of the work to execute.
common_request_fields.execucao.escopo: List of executed or planned technical activities.
common_request_fields.execucao.equipamentos: List of HVAC equipment in proposta schema.
common_request_fields.execucao.dutos_extras: List of extras with desc and valor.
common_request_fields.valores.gestao_valor: Engineering, management and technical execution value.
common_request_fields.documentos: List of document types to compile.

proposta.title: Proposta Tecnica Executiva
proposta.copy_floor: Must preserve or exceed the 12-page reference proposal: presentation, Refrimix authority, high-end projects, objective, Daikin equipment, authorized dealer supply, coastal engineering, methodology, refrigeration infrastructure, ducts, commissioning, Daikin warranty, ART/CREA responsibility, investment, commercial terms, payment, final considerations and 34-item checklist.

contrato.title: Contrato de Instalacao e Execucao
contrato.copy_floor: Must exceed the Gemini 1-page contract. Include executive table, 10 clauses, responsibilities, acceptance criteria, linked annexes and signatures.

os.title: Ordem de Servico de Campo
os.copy_floor: Must be operational, auditable and usable by field technicians. Keep status, checklist and signature above decorative content.

contrato_prestacao.title: Contrato de Prestacao de Servicos SRE
contrato_prestacao.copy_floor: Must define recurring service or SLA with measurable response, responsibility boundaries, evidence and warranty.

orcamento_material.title: Orcamento de Materiais e Insumos
orcamento_material.copy_floor: Must explain material value before price: durability, coastal resistance, traceability, logistics and invoice conditions.

orcamento_mao_de_obra.title: Orcamento de Mao de Obra e Execucao
orcamento_mao_de_obra.copy_floor: Must show specialized execution value, not a generic labor line. Include engineering, installation, commissioning and safety.
